figures.caption: Fig. 1: Motivation of the proposed SpecMamba. Conventional direct spectral modeling often leads to boundary ambiguity, while the proposed frequencyconditioned modeling reorganizes HSI representations in the frequency domain to effectively separate targets from background.
Fig. 9: Fig. S1. Sensitivity analysis of SpecMamba with respect to four key parameters on the four benchmark datasets.
